name: Hearty Rye Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bread machine pan in the order specified.
2. Select the white bread setting.
3. Press Start.
4. The machine will mix and knead the dough until it is ready to bake.
5. A loaf of dense, chewy, and flavorful rye bread will be made, perfect for serving with soups and stews.
6. Makes 1 loaf, yielding approximately 8 slices.
7. Each slice contains about 142 calories, less than 1 gram of dietary fiber, less than 1 gram of soluble fiber, 27 grams of carbohydrates, 4 grams of protein, 2 grams of fat (14% of calories from fat), 1 mg of cholesterol, and 292 mg of sodium.
